query:
SELECT university_name,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_url IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_url IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_image,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN image_url IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 0) as pct
FROM professors
GROUP BY university_name
HAVING without_image > 0
ORDER BY without_image DESC;

FROM professors
